evaluation.summary: The adaptive LDAB calibration fails to achieve KL divergence below 1e-4 for primorial bases up to 30030, indicating no breakthrough in the model's convergence.
next_directions: Extend the prime range to >10^7 to assess asymptotic behavior of KL divergence.
Explore alternative divergence metrics (e.g., Wasserstein distance) and non‑uniform residue class weighting.
Conduct a systematic sensitivity analysis of the LDAB model parameters and boundary conditions.
